mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interaction_event (topic_id, user_id, interaction_type, device_fingerprint, ip_address) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{userId}, #{interactionType}, #{deviceFingerprint}, #{ipAddress})

INSERT INTO interaction_event (topic_id, user_id, interaction_type, device_fingerprint, ip_address) VALUES
(#{item.topicId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.interactionType}, #{item.deviceFingerprint}, #{item.ipAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT topic_id, interaction_type, COUNT(*) as total_count FROM interaction_event WHERE created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime} GROUP BY topic_id, interaction_type
SELECT topic_id, interaction_type, COUNT(*) as total_count FROM interaction_event GROUP BY topic_id, interaction_type

SELECT topic_id, SUM(CASE interaction_type WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 3 WHEN 5 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) AS weighted_score, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM interaction_event WHERE created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime} GROUP BY topic_id
